name: Fort Bragg
description_short: Community First Credit Union operates a branch in Fort Bragg, CA offering traditional credit union banking services including checking, savings, loans, and ATM access.
description_long: Community First Credit Union maintains a physical presence in Fort Bragg, California through its branch located at 147 N Franklin Street. As a credit union, it operates under a member-owned cooperative model rather than as a traditional for-profit bank. The organization provides standard retail banking services to the Fort Bragg community and surrounding areas. The credit union offers multiple banking services including deposit accounts (checking and savings), lending products, ATM access, and branch banking. Their Fort Bragg location operates during standard business hours (9:00 am - 5:00 pm) and provides in-person customer service. Members can access loan calculators and branch locator tools through the organization's online resources to compare options and find services. As a credit union rather than a commercial bank, Community First Credit Union theoretically offers member-focused benefits typical of the credit union model, though specific product details, rates, and fees are not provided on this directory listing. The organization operates at least one physical branch, indicating commitment to in-person banking services rather than digital-only operations. This profile is based on a directory listing rather than the credit union's primary website, so detailed information about specific products, rates, membership requirements, and service comparisons is unavailable. Consumers should contact the branch directly or visit the credit union's official website to evaluate whether membership and services meet their specific financial needs.

Standard business hours (9:00 am - 5:00 pm) accessible to working consumers
Credit union model typically offers lower fees and better loan rates than commercial banks
Provides loan products with online loan calculator tools
Multiple banking services available including deposits and lending
Local presence in Fort Bragg community
cons: Limited information available on this directory listing about specific products, rates, or fees
Single branch location may not be convenient for all Fort Bragg area residents
No information provided about membership requirements or eligibility criteria

best_for: Fort Bragg residents seeking traditional in-person banking services
Local consumers looking for credit union membership benefits
Borrowers interested in credit union lending products with potentially lower rates
diagnosis: Community First Credit Union is best for Fort Bragg-area residents who value in-person banking services and the credit union cooperative model. The main caveat is that this directory listing provides minimal detail about specific products, rates, membership requirements, and service capabilities—consumers must contact the branch directly or visit the credit union's official website for complete information.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
